# Based News Reader

An automated news digest curation web application. Curated hourly by Google Gemini (`gemini-2.5-flash-lite`) from Google News RSS feeds based on user configurations, and served from a PostgreSQL database using a lightweight Flask backend.

> https://news.blakerayvid.com

## Core URL Paths

- `/` : Dynamic news digest homepage. Features a swipable calendar carousel of hourly digests. Click any topic header to drill down into chronological daily headlines.
- `/forecast` : Prediction tracking dashboard showing sector picks, price projections, and contextual market charts compiled via Yahoo Finance data.

## Server API Endpoints

- `GET /manifest` : Retrieves a JSON array of the latest history digests containing their database IDs and generation timestamps.
- `GET /digest/<int:digest_id>` : Fetches server-side rendered HTML fragments containing categorized news topics and links for a specified digest ID.
- `GET /api/topic/<path:topic_name>` : Fetches grouped, chronological daily headlines (up to the 10 most recent days) for a given topic as JSON.

## Architecture

- **Curation Worker (`digest/digest.py`)**: Fetches target RSS feeds, structures deduplicated arguments, queries Gemini for context-sensitive weights, and commits output arrays to PostgreSQL.
- **Web App (`web/app.py`)**: Flask web service facilitating standard SQL operations and returning rendered template parameters.
- **Frontend**: Dependency-free Vanilla JS/CSS facilitating fluid slider cards, keyboard navigation (`Arrows` to navigate days, `Esc` to close drilldown details), and touch-swipe gestures on mobile screens.
